metadata.title: LoreForge
metadata.description: LoreForge frontend for campaigns, character sheets, and real-time maps.

login.title: LoreForge
login.tagline: The truth lies beyond the Membrane. Forge your investigation, track clues, and command the paranormal.
login.disclaimer: LoreForge is an unofficial VTT platform.

authError.failed: Could not complete sign-in. Please try again.
authError.missing: Invalid or expired sign-in session. Please try again.
authError.session: Your session expired or could not be validated. Please sign in again.
authError.config: The frontend is not pointing at the production API. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in Vercel and redeploy.

characters.title: Your agents
characters.description: Permanent sheets are separate from each campaign’s inventory and current state.
characters.name: Character name
characters.attributeHelp: Distribute four points; every attribute starts at 1. Points used: {points}/4.
characters.derivedHelp: Derived values are calculated by the API when this sheet is saved.
characters.validation: Check the highlighted section and try again. Your draft is still saved.
characters.copyPrompt: Private label for the copied sheet:
characters.archiveConfirm: Archive this campaign sheet? It can only be copied afterwards.
characters.noCampaignState: This unassigned sheet has no campaign-specific inventory or current state yet.
characters.ownerState: Only the sheet owner can update campaign state.
characters.gmInventory: Only the GM can manage campaign inventory.
characters.ownerCopy: Only the sheet owner can copy this sheet.
characters.ownerArchive: Only the sheet owner can archive this sheet.

npc.title: Create NPC
npc.name: Name
npc.saveFailed: NPC could not be saved. Check the campaign and required fields.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Create campaigns, edit your table, and add players by short code.
campaigns.inviteFailed: Could not send invitation. Check the short code and permissions.
campaigns.savedDescription: Name, description and members. No extra details in the list.
campaigns.name: Name
campaigns.memberDescription: Player short codes and table role.
campaigns.inviteDescription: Send a campaign invitation using their short code.
campaigns.selectCampaign: Select a campaign to see its members.
